mail.name: Reset Password Verification
mail.subject: Reset Password Verification
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account.

Your password reset code is ##CODE##. This code is valid for next ##TOKEN_LIFETIME## minutes.

If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.

Thank you!

mail.name: Email Change Verification
mail.subject: Email Change Verification
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

We have recevied email change request from you!

Your one time verification code is ##CODE##.

This code is valid for ##TOKEN_LIFETIME## minutes.

If you haven't requested for email change, please ignore this email.

Thank you!

mail.name: Reset Password Alert
mail.subject: Reset Password Alert
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

Your password has been reset successfully!

Click on the below link to continue login.

[Login Now](##URL##)

If you haven't changed your password, please contact administrator.

Thank you!

mail.name: OTP
mail.subject: OTP
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

Your one time password is: ##CODE##

This code is valid for the next ##TOKEN_LIFETIME## minutes!

Do not share this code with anyone else.

Thank you!

mail.name: Two Factor Security
mail.subject: Two Factor Security
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

Your one time two factor security code is: ##CODE##

This code is valid for the next ##TOKEN_LIFETIME## minutes!

Do not share this code with anyone else.

Thank you!

mail.name: Email Verification
mail.subject: Email Verification
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

Thank you for registering an account with us.

Click on the below link to verify your account.

[Verify my Email](##URL##)

If you haven't registered with us, please ignore this email.

Thank you!

mail.name: Username Change Verification
mail.subject: Username Change Verification
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

We have recevied username change request from you!

Your one time verification code is ##CODE##

This code is valid for the next ##TOKEN_LIFETIME## minutes!

If you haven't requested for username change, please ignore this email.

Thank you!

mail.name: Account Registered
mail.subject: Account Registered
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

Thank you for registering an account with us.

Click on the below link to login.

[Login Now](##URL##)

If you haven't registered with us, please ignore this email.

Thank you!

mail.name: Upcoming Reminder
mail.subject: Upcoming Reminder
mail.content:

This is a friendly reminder for ##TITLE## scheduled for ##DATE## which is just ##DAYS_LEFT## day(s) away.

Details:

Title: ##TITLE##

Scheduled Date: ##DATE##

Note: ##NOTE##

Please make the necessary arrangements.

Thank you!

mail.content:

This is a reminder that ##TITLE## is scheduled for today, ##DATE##.

Details:

Title: ##TITLE##

Due Date: ##DATE##

Note: ##NOTE##

Please take the necessary actions.

Thank you!

mail.name: Online Registration Email Verification
mail.subject: Online Registration
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

Your request for registration for ##PROGRAM## ##PERIOD## ##COURSE## has been received with application number ##APPLICATION_NUMBER##.

Please use ##OTP## to confirm your email.

If you haven't registered with us, please ignore this email.

Thank you!

mail.name: Online Registration Email Confirmed
mail.subject: Online Registration Application Number
mail.content:
Hi ##NAME##,

Your request for registration for ##PROGRAM## ##PERIOD## ##COURSE## has been received.

Your application number is ##APPLICATION_NUMBER##.

Use this application number to complete your application.

Thank you!

mail.name: Online Registration Submitted

Thank you!

Your registration fee payment of ##AMOUNT## for application number ##APPLICATION_NUMBER## - ##PROGRAM## ##PERIOD## ##COURSE## is received at ##PAYMENT_DATETIME##. You can use ##REFERENCE_NUMBER## for payment related query.

Thank you!

mail.name: Registration Approved

Your request for registration with registration number ##REGISTRATION_NUMBER## for ##PROGRAM## ##PERIOD## ##COURSE## has been approved.

We welcome you to our institute and wish you all the best for the future.

Thank you!
